ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT THOMAS, JURRELL THOMAS, ROSEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, JURRELL THOMAS, ROSEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1686 OAKDALE AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-29-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 9/29/98 AT MIDNIGHT. NO FURTHER STAYS AFTER GIVEN DATE. JUDGMT. INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS AND OTHERS IN POSSESSION. IF NOT OUT BY GIVEN DATE, PLTF. TO AMEND JDGMT. MONEY DAMAGES AND COST TO BE $2,486. AS TO JURRELL AND ROSEY
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT THOMAS, JURRELL THOMAS, ROSEY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

C/C FOR COURT TRIAL IN ROOM# 622. VISTING JUDGE MARY C. MORGAN. DIANE CARTER, CLERK. DIANA PADILLA, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT, MARTHA PASSALAQUA, ATTY. FOR PLTF. MARCIA THOMAS, REPRESENTING PLAINTIFF.
